memory.summary: I have a plan to finish analysis then reading, but a friend just invited me to lunch together.
I made good progress on the assignment analysis, but my friend's group is ordering food immediately, signaling a potential lunch break.
I made progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour left until the deadline, I must prioritize finishing this task immediately.
I spent 0.8 hours on the analysis section, reaching 77% completion with under an hour left before the deadline.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the analysis section, which is now only 78% complete despite my recent efforts.
After working 1.5 hours, the analysis section is now 85% complete, but I am still behind the original deadline and facing high stress.
I have barely progressed the analysis section to 86%, but I completely missed the Assigned reading deadline which remains at 0% completion.
I made slow but steady progress on the analysis section, reaching 92% completion after two hours of work.
After one more hour, the analysis section is nearly done at 95%, yet my energy is depleted and stress remains high.
The analysis section is now 97% complete after working until midnight, but my energy is at zero and stress remains high.
I reached 98% completion on the analysis section after working until nearly midnight, but my energy is now completely depleted and stress remains high.
The analysis section is now 99% complete after a final half-hour, leaving the task essentially finished despite my zero energy and high stress.
